prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-PPWATERBOTTLE-PWPAB662-AMZ Product Type: BOTTLE Brand (from catalog): Zak Designs Existing Title: Paw Patrol Kids Pull Top Plastic Water Bottle School Supplies 17oz Description: It’s pups to the rescue just in time for back to school with this perfectly sized kid's Paw Patrol water bottle. Just the right size for smaller hands and a snap tight drink spout, it’s everything your little Paw Patrol fan needs to stay hydrated; this Paw Patrol water bottle puts health and safety first by being non-toxic and BPA-free.

Hydration is a must for kids to maintain a healthy weight, improve their memory and stay focused, whether at school, playing sports, or participating in extracurricular activities; this 17-ounce water bottle is the perfect size for them to manage their water intake and easily refill if needed. And, measuring 7.5 inches tall by 2.5 inches wide, this Paw Patrol water bottle with fun Chase, Rubble, and Marshall graphic is perfect for smaller hands; kids will easily be able to open via the pull top and squeeze to drink, all while maintaining a secure grip.

Help your little Paw Patrols fans learn the importance of hydration with the Paw Patrol 17oz BPA Free Plastic Pull Top Squeeze Water Bottle.

An officially licensed Paw Patrol product. Search Terms: water bottles kids bottle for school sports boys pups supplies back to cute suppplies Features: - PAW PATROL WATER BOTTLE: It’s pups to the rescue just in time for back to school with this perfectly sized kids Paw Patrol water bottle! Just the right size for smaller hands and a snap tight drink spout, it’s everything your little Paw Patrol fan needs to stay hydrated; this Paw Patrol water bottle puts health and safety first by being non-toxic and BPA free - BACK TO SCHOOL MUST-HAVE: Hydration is a must for kids to maintain a healthy weight, improve their memory and stay focused, whether at school, playing sports or participating in extracurricular activities; this 17 ounce water bottle is the perfect size for them to manage their water intake and easily refill if needed - PERFECT FOR SMALL HANDS: Measuring 7.5 inches tall by 2.5 inches wide, this Paw Patrol water bottle with Chase, Rubble and Marshall graphic is perfect for smaller hands; kids will easily be able to open via the pull top and squeeze to drink, all while maintaining a secure grip! - SNAP TIGHT DRINK SPOUT – The Paw Patrol water bottle for back to school, sports and more, comes with screw on lids that feature quick push and pull leakproof spouts, so kids can get a quick, refreshing drink without slowing down as they race between activities and when closed properly, won’t leak into backpacks, in the car or elsewhere - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 7.5 x 2.5 inches; Colors: Red, Blue; Material: BPA free plastic; Officially licensed Paw Patrol merchandise === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
